title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud presents the Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with Agent Registry to enable orchestration of AI agents and tools across SaaS and on-premises systems. The session covers integration with Model Context Protocol servers, both existing implementations and custom-built ones using specification boost to convert APIs into agent-ready tools.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates the Agent Development Kit (ADK) combined with Agent Registry to orchestrate AI agents and tools across SaaS and on-premises systems. The session integrates Model Context Protocol servers, covering both existing implementations and custom ones built by using specification boost to convert APIs into agent-ready tools. The takeaway: ADK and the registry handle discovery and orchestration of agents and tools, and MCP plus tool schemas standardize how APIs become callable by agents.
